{{Quote|I couldn't have said it better myself. And that ends this session of "The Emperor's Court." Tune in for next week's trial: midi-chlorians vs. the divine Force—what should be taught in schools?|LU-L-N|<ref name="The Emperor's Court">{{Tales|14|The Emperor's Court}}</ref>}}
'''LU-L-N''' was an [[8D smelter droid]] who served as a [[Journalist/Legends|reporter]] for ''The Emperor's Court''. After a trial for the murder of [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]], LU-L-N interviewed the defendant, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who lost the case and was sentenced to life frozen in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]]. After the short discussion, LU-L-N directed him to the chamber and [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. The plaintiff, [[Neela]], the mother of Greedo, was interviewed second. Afterwards, LU-L-N concluded the segment with a tease for the next episode.<ref name="SWT 14">[[Star Wars Tales 14|''Star Wars Tales'' 14]]</ref>

LU-L-N wore a [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Suit/Legends|suit]] and sported fiery red [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="SWT 14" />

==Behind the scenes==
LU-L-N appeared in "[[The Emperor's Court]]," the second story in [[Star Wars Tales 14|''Star Wars Tales'' 14]]. The issue was released on [[December 11]], [[2002]], and was written by [[Jason Hall]], with art by [[Ramón F. Bachs]].<ref name="SWT 14" />

LU-L-N is a parody of reporter Doug Llewelyn, who reported for the television series [[Wikipedia:The People's Court|''The People's Court'']].
